description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push and pull request. Use a matrix job on ubuntu-latest to test with Python 3.7, 3.8, 3.9, and 3.10. For each Python version, check out the repository, install Miniforge, create a test environment, activate it, install dependencies, run tests with coverage, and optionally upload coverage to Codecov for Python 3.8.
